<?php namespace Spatie\FlareClient\FlareMiddleware; use Spatie\FlareClient\Report; class CensorRequestBodyFields implements FlareMiddleware { protected array $fieldNames = []; public function __construct(array $fieldNames) { $this->fieldNames = $fieldNames; } public function handle(Report $report, $next) { $context = $report->allContext(); foreach ($this->fieldNames as $fieldName) { if (isset($context['request_data']['body'][$fieldName])) { $context['request_data']['body'][$fieldName] = '<CENSORED>'; } } $report->userProvidedContext($context); return $next($report); } }
